3D Spatial Knowledge Graph.description: 3D network mesh visualizing parent-child organizational hierarchy and secondary links.
subFeatures: Dynamic viewport minimap navigation
Standard 3D canvas rendering with direct-line hierarchy
Sleek floating glassmorphic toolbar at the top-left containing label, layout, and 2D/3D projection toggles
Left-sidebar toggle switcher underneath citations toggle with symmetric 8px spacing
Unconditional RPG and entertainment node dynamic tree hierarchy pruning
Flat top-right 2D minimap navigation control display
Real-time, relative viewport zoom scale metric indicator overlay
Entity-type-coloured pill label borders in 3D spatial and instanced views
Visible parent-child connection lines on 2D minimap with proper SVG coordinate rendering
Mesh Appearance panel drawer featuring controls for Child Gap, Parent Distance, Tension, and a comparative 'BETA GRAPH' toggle for before/after layout comparison

Oatmeal Premium Theme Layout.description: Premium theme layout wrapping featuring glassmorphism, responsive sidebar layout with resize handles, voice telemetry integration, and GBP regionalisation.
subFeatures: Interactive top header with model selection and usage tracking
Dual-sidebar architecture with resize drag boundaries
Haptic active state feedback and viewport containment reliability

Topic Discovery & Session Panel.description: Dedicated control panel managing research sessions, document library categorization and AI synthesis triggers.
subFeatures: Auto-generated session chat logs
Topic tag filtering and suggested prompts
Notebook clipboard for pinning references and drive file sync indicator
Conversational search bar with dynamic query matching
Pinned conversation slots displaying at the top of the history stack
Individual session deletion with Lucide visual progress tracking
Bulk conversation deletion with robust double confirmation safeguards
